stage_timeline.note: Room setup, anesthesia, sterile prep, and device-table activity.
Access-site work and sheath/wire setup, usually groin-focused for transfemoral cases.
Monitor/C-arm focus, aortography alignment, and valve crossing work.
Optional pre-dilation; visually confusable with post-dilation or deployment.
Delivery system/device preparation with concentrated table-side attention.
High-attention deployment moment; video-only confidence should remain modest.
Angiographic/echo assessment and possible post-dilation loop.
Access closure, final vessel checks, drape-down, and room cleanup.
